# Dealix — End-to-End Focus-5 Completion Report

*Generated by hand on 2026-06-03 as part of the end-to-end completion work.*

This report documents the build of Dealix as an end-to-end acquisition → call →
mini-proposal → delivery → reporting machine for the five launch systems, plus a
professional Arabic (RTL) marketing site.

> **Stack note / adaptation.** The original brief assumed a Next.js `app/[locale]`
> site. The actual repository is a **Vite + React 19 + react-router 7** SPA. The
> website was therefore built with `react-router` routes (Arabic-only RTL, no
> locale prefix) instead of `app/[locale]`. All other layers (docs, schemas,
> data, scripts, reports) were implemented as specified.

---

## 1. Files created / modified

**Created (high level):**
- `data/systems.json` — canonical 5-systems registry (single source of truth).
- `schemas/*.json` — **12** JSON Schemas (acquisition, outreach, delivery).
- `data/**/*.jsonl` — **13** operational data files (sample seed; fictional companies).
- `scripts/*.js` — **6** Node ESM scripts (machine) + `scripts/lib/commercial.js`.
- `reports/**/*.md` — **17** generated reports (outreach, acquisition, delivery, founder).
- `docs/**/*.md` — **25** Arabic operating docs (acquisition 10, delivery 7, founder_control 2, outreach 4, site 1, whatsapp 1).
- `src/data/systems.ts` + `src/data/systems.test.ts` — typed display registry + consistency test.
- `src/components/site/*` — shared nav, footer, layout, system card, icon map.
- `src/pages/marketing/*` — **8** marketing pages.
- `src/lib/contact.ts`, `AGENTS.md`.

**Modified:**
- `src/App.tsx` — wired 8 marketing routes.
- `src/pages/LandingPage.tsx` — rebuilt around the 5 systems + new IA.
- `package.json` — added `commercial:seed`, `commercial:reports`; `commercial:all` now runs the full chain.
- `vitest.config.ts` — test glob extended to `src/**/*.test.ts`.

## 2. Website pages created

`react-router` routes (all Arabic RTL, reusing the emerald/teal design system):

| Route | Page |
|-------|------|
| `/` | Landing (rebuilt: hero, problem, 5 systems, how-it-works, pricing preview, diagnostic CTA, governance) |
| `/systems` | Systems index (5 cards + diagnostic CTA) |
| `/systems/:slug` | System detail — one component renders all 5 from the registry |
| `/pricing` | Pricing (5 systems, cheapest-first, Sprint note) |
| `/diagnostic` | Interactive 7-question diagnostic → recommended system + first sprint + price |
| `/start` | Start form (mailto handoff; nothing auto-sent) |
| `/contact` | Contact form + channels |
| `/resources` | 5 resource guides linked to systems |
| `/partners` | Partner program (5 partner types) |

Each **system detail page** includes every required block: hero, pain, who-it-is-for,
benefits, first-result-in-5–14-days, delivery pack, required inputs, acceptance
criteria, starting price, FAQ, and CTA. No guaranteed claims; no internal module
codenames in customer copy.

## 3. Five systems — copy summary

All copy lives once in `data/systems.json` (and mirrored in `src/data/systems.ts`):

- **نظام تشغيل الإيرادات** — يكشف تسرب الإيراد ويبني مسار متابعة وقرار يومي.
- **نظام القيادة التنفيذية** — تقرير قرار يومي: أهم فرصة، أكبر خطر، القرار التالي.
- **نظام استعادة المتابعة** — يمنع ضياع الفرص بسبب متابعة لم تحدث.
- **نظام عملاء واتساب** — يحوّل واتساب إلى مسارات وبطاقات إجراء وتصعيد.
- **نظام العروض والإثبات** — قالب عرض و Proof Pack مقنع.

## 4. Pricing summary

| System | Starts at | Sprint |
|--------|----------:|--------|
| Proposal & Proof OS | 3,000 SAR | 5–7 أيام |
| Follow-up Recovery OS | 3,500 SAR | 7 أيام |
| Revenue Operating System | 4,500 SAR | 7–10 أيام |
| WhatsApp Client OS | 4,500 SAR | 7–10 أيام |
| Executive Command OS | 5,500 SAR | 7–14 يومًا |

Framed as "starts at" + a Sprint note that full projects/integrations are priced
after diagnosis. No guaranteed-revenue language.

## 5. Outreach — 400-draft system

- Distribution enforced from the registry: **Revenue 100 · Follow-up 90 · Executive 70 · WhatsApp 70 · Proposal 70 = 400/day** (verified to sum to 400).
- `commercial-daily-plan.js` → `reports/outreach/DAILY_400_SYSTEM_DRAFT_PRODUCTION.md` (plan vs staged drafts).
- `draft-quality-gate.js` scores every staged draft with a deterministic 100-pt rubric (Personalization 25 · Pain 20 · Fit 20 · CTA 15 · Risk 10 · Tone 10) and gates **≥75** into `reports/outreach/TOP_100_SYSTEM_APPROVAL_QUEUE.md`. Drafts containing guarantee-style claims are excluded.
- Hard rule honored: **drafts required, sends not enabled, founder approval gate.**

## 6. Acquisition pack structure

`schemas/company_intelligence_pack.schema.json` + `data/acquisition/company_intelligence_packs.jsonl`
carry all specified fields (company … evidence_level). Evidence levels L0–L4; L0/L1
phrased as assumptions. Docs: `docs/acquisition/*` (10 files).

## 7. Call brief system

`schemas/call_brief.schema.json` + `data/acquisition/call_briefs.jsonl` — human-caller
briefs with opening line + discovery questions + objection/response + next step.
Surfaced in `reports/acquisition/CALL_FOLLOWUP_QUEUE.md`. **No automated calling.**

## 8. Mini proposal system

`schemas/mini_proposal.schema.json` + `data/acquisition/mini_proposals.jsonl` — all
fields incl. `approval_required: true`. The control check fails if any proposal
lacks approval, deliverables, or a starter price, or contains a guarantee claim.
Surfaced in `reports/acquisition/MINI_PROPOSAL_QUEUE.md`.

## 9. Delivery automation pipeline

13-state pipeline (`interested … renewal_candidate`) in
`schemas/delivery_pipeline.schema.json`. **Schema + control check both enforce that
work states require `required_inputs_received: true`** — delivery cannot start
without inputs. Tasks, acceptance gates, and weekly value reports have their own
schemas + data. Reports: `reports/delivery/*` (pipeline status, blockers, WVR queue,
acceptance review). Docs: `docs/delivery/*` (7 files).

## 10. Weekly value report system

`schemas/weekly_value_report.schema.json` + `data/delivery/weekly_value_reports.jsonl`
— delivered-this-week + evidence + next focus + renewal signal. No guaranteed-outcome
claims (control check scans these). Doc: `docs/delivery/WEEKLY_VALUE_REPORTS_AR.md`.

## 11. Founder daily command system

`commercial-daily-brief.js` → `reports/founder/DAILY_SUPER_COMMAND.md` answers the 8
daily questions (drafts, Top 100, who-needs-a-call, mini proposals, interested,
open delivery, blockers, top decision) and computes the single most-important
decision. `generate-reports.js` also produces `reports/founder/WEEKLY_BOARD_REVIEW.md`.
Docs: `docs/founder_control/*` (2 files).

## 12. Tests / checks run

| Check | Command | Result |
|-------|---------|--------|
| Typecheck | `npm run check` (`tsc -b`) | ✅ pass (exit 0) |
| Unit tests | `npx vitest run` | ✅ 4/4 pass (systems consistency) |
| Production build | `npm run build` | ✅ pass (`dist/public` + `dist/boot.js`) |
| Commercial pipeline | `npm run commercial:all` | ✅ control 20 ok / 0 fail / 0 warn; gate 12 scored, 10 passed, 2 below; 17 reports |
| Guardrail negative test | `DEALIX_SEND=true node scripts/commercial-control-check.js` | ✅ exits **1** (send correctly blocked); normal run exits 0 |
| Schema/JSONL validity | node JSON.parse over all schemas + data | ✅ 12 schemas, 13 data files valid |
| Draft distribution | sum of `ops.drafts_per_day` | ✅ = 400 |
| Banned-claim scan | grep over `data/` and `src/` | ✅ clean (tokens only in guardrail definitions) |

Spec "tests/checks if feasible" coverage: every intelligence pack has a
`recommended_system` and a role within the system's allowed roles; every call brief
has an opening line + questions; every mini proposal has deliverables + starter
price; delivery can't start without inputs; no guaranteed claims; no secret fields
— all enforced by `commercial-control-check.js`.

## 13. Failed / skipped checks and why

- **`npm run lint` reports 23 errors — all pre-existing**, in files not touched by
  this work (`Dashboard.tsx`, `Finance.tsx`, `Governance.tsx`, `Prospects.tsx`,
  `providers/trpc.tsx`: `no-explicit-any` / react-refresh). My new/modified files
  add **zero** lint errors. Lint was already red on `main`; pre-existing debt left as-is.
- **Browser render/E2E tests skipped.** No jsdom/RTL harness is set up; coverage is
  via typecheck + production build (all pages bundle) + the data-consistency unit test.
- **Schema validation uses `JSON.parse` + structural control-check, not a JSON-Schema
  validator** (no `ajv` in deps; not added to avoid a new dependency).
- **Data is sample/seed** (fictional companies via `scripts/seed-sample-data.js`) to
  exercise the machine — not a real 400/day production run.

## 14. Remaining risks

- Two registries (`data/systems.json`, `src/data/systems.ts`) can drift; mitigated by
  `src/data/systems.test.ts`, but a future edit to one only will fail the test (by design).
- `src/lib/contact.ts` `CONTACT_EMAIL` is a placeholder (`hello@dealix.sa`) — must be set before launch.
- The site is Arabic-only; no i18n/locale routing (matches existing app, differs from the original Next.js brief).
- Build emits a >500 kB JS chunk (no code-splitting) — performance, not correctness.
- The actual draft *generator* (producing 400 real drafts from public research) is
  out of scope here; the machine validates, scores, gates, and reports drafts that are staged into `data/outreach/email_drafts.jsonl`.

## 15. Founder next actions

1. Set `CONTACT_EMAIL` in `src/lib/contact.ts` to the real inbox.
2. Replace sample data with real Company Intelligence Packs (public/founder data only); keep the suppression list current.
3. Run `npm run commercial:all` daily; review `reports/founder/DAILY_SUPER_COMMAND.md`, approve from the Top 100 queue.
4. Keep `commercial:check` green — it is the guardrail gate (send stays disabled, drafts stay drafts, no claims, inputs-before-delivery).
5. (Optional) Pay down the pre-existing lint debt and add code-splitting.
